content.thinking: The user is asking about turning evals into tests by specifying a minimum score threshold, so they can run evals as part of CI/testing and fail if scores drop below a certain level. Let me look at how evals are set up in this project.

content.text: Let me check how evals are currently structured in this project.

content.thinking: The user wants to know if they can turn evals into tests with minimum score thresholds. Looking at the code, they're using `evalite` (which is built on vitest) for evals. Let me check what evalite offers for assertions/thresholds.
